scripts.concat-css: npx concat -o dist/css/bundle.css public/assets/css/styles.css public/assets/css/main.css public/assets/css/header.css public/assets/css/nav.css public/assets/css/footer.css public/assets/css/modal.css public/assets/css/forms.css public/assets/css/catalog.css public/assets/css/product-detail.css public/assets/css/checkout.css public/assets/css/admin.css public/assets/css/pages.css
scripts.minify-js: npx terser --compress --mangle --module --output dist/js/app.min.js -- public/assets/js/cart.js public/assets/js/search.js public/assets/js/auth.js public/assets/js/checkout_modal.js public/assets/js/rating.js public/assets/js/favorite.js public/assets/js/navigation.js
scripts.build: npm run prepare-dirs && npm run copy-js-deps && npm run copy-images && npm run concat-css && npm run minify-css && npm run minify-js
